creator: hippi-viking@protonmail.com
text:
(In reply to Vincenzo Maffione from comment #5)
I still can see this issue under load on FreeBSD 11.2-RELEASE-p9-HBSD with an integrated Realtek RTL8111/8168/8411 chip:
